app.title: SDGs-tory
app.subtitle: Discovering Sustainable Development Goals through Stories

home.welcome: Which activity would you like to try?
home.mode1Desc: Choose SDGs goals and create a story based on them
home.mode2Desc: Read and rewrite stories, then find hidden SDGs within them

mode1.title: SDGs → Story
mode1.selectGoalsDesc: Choose the goals you want to include in your story
mode1.settingTimePlaceholder: When does the story take place?
mode1.settingPlacePlaceholder: Where does the story take place?
mode1.summaryPlaceholder: Summarize the plot in one sentence
mode1.sdgConnectionPlaceholder: Explain how this goal connects to your story...

mode2.settingTimePlaceholder: When does the story take place?
mode2.settingPlacePlaceholder: Where does the story take place?
mode2.summaryPlaceholder: Summarize the plot in one sentence
mode2.sdgConnectionPlaceholder: Explain the connection between this goal and your story...

common.invalidJson: This is not a valid JSON file.

help.title: How to Use
help.step1: 1. Select your preferred activity mode from the home screen.
help.step2: 2. In 'SDGs → Story' mode, select SDGs goals first, then create a story.
help.step3: 3. In 'Story → SDGs' mode, write a story and connect SDGs goals within it.
help.step4: 4. Use the export button at the bottom right to save or share your work.
help.step5: 5. Use the icons at the top to change theme and language.

1.name: No Poverty
1.desc: End poverty in all its forms everywhere

2.name: Zero Hunger
2.desc: End hunger, achieve food security and improved nutrition, and promote sustainable agriculture

3.name: Good Health and Well-being
3.desc: Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages

4.name: Quality Education
4.desc: Ensure inclusive and equitable quality education and promote lifelong learning opportunities for all

5.name: Gender Equality
5.desc: Achieve gender equality and empower all women and girls

6.name: Clean Water and Sanitation
6.desc: Ensure availability and sustainable management of water and sanitation for all

7.name: Affordable and Clean Energy
7.desc: Ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all

8.name: Decent Work and Economic Growth
8.desc: Promote sustained, inclusive and sustainable economic growth, full and productive employment and decent work for all

9.name: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
9.desc: Build resilient infrastructure, promote inclusive and sustainable industrialization and foster innovation

10.name: Reduced Inequalities
10.desc: Reduce inequality within and among countries

11.name: Sustainable Cities and Communities
11.desc: Make cities and human settlements inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable

12.name: Responsible Consumption and Production
12.desc: Ensure sustainable consumption and production patterns

13.name: Climate Action
13.desc: Take urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts

14.name: Life Below Water
14.desc: Conserve and sustainably use the oceans, seas and marine resources for sustainable development

15.name: Life on Land
15.desc: Protect, restore and promote sustainable use of terrestrial ecosystems, sustainably manage forests, combat desertification, and halt and reverse land degradation and halt biodiversity loss

16.name: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions
16.desc: Promote peaceful and inclusive societies for sustainable development, provide access to justice for all and build effective, accountable and inclusive institutions at all levels

17.name: Partnerships for the Goals
17.desc: Strengthen the means of implementation and revitalize the global partnership for sustainable development
